backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister with customer registration/login, service order submission and management, admin QR settings, and access-controlled query/update methods for a service center app.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the admin dashboard auto-refresh requirement to its implementing files (AdminDashboard.tsx and useQueries.ts) with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing component responsibilities and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes covering colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vijay Online Centre app that loads Poppins and Noto Sans Devanagari fonts and mounts the React app via the /src/main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component implementing a screen-based state machine that routes between splash, login, customer, and admin screens while integrating AuthContext for session persistence and logout handling.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin dashboard component displaying order stats, a tabbed order list with expandable OrderCards, inline status dropdowns, and a live auto-refresh indicator showing last-updated timestamp with a pulsing green dot.
frontend/src/components/AdminLogin.tsx: Renders a secure admin login form with user ID and password fields, using the AuthContext's adminLogin method to authenticate and calling onSuccess or displaying an error on result.
frontend/src/components/AdminQRManagemen: Admin panel component with two tabs for managing payment QR codes: uploading a permanent QR image (base64) and setting an auto-QR amount, backed by React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Static contact page displaying a helpline phone number with action buttons for WhatsApp chat, direct call, and Google Maps location for Vijay Online Centre.
frontend/src/components/CustomerLogin.ts: Customer authentication component supporting manual login, registration, and OTP-based login modes, using React Query mutations and storing the session via AuthContext.
frontend/src/components/Home.tsx: Home dashboard showing a personalized welcome header, quick-access action buttons navigating to key tabs, and a highlights strip summarizing platform features.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app shell component providing a top navigation bar with logo/user info and logout, a scrollable content area, and a bottom tab navigation bar that switches between customer and admin tab sets.
frontend/src/components/LoginSelection.t: Landing screen that presents two login options (Customer and Admin) with styled buttons, allowing the user to choose their login flow.
frontend/src/components/MyOrders.tsx: Customer-facing orders list page that fetches and displays all orders for the logged-in customer, sorted newest-first, with color-coded status badges and navigation to order detail or receipt views.
frontend/src/components/OrderTracking.ts: Order detail/tracking page that fetches a single order by ID and renders a step-progress timeline for standard statuses or a rejection notice, along with order metadata and attachments.
frontend/src/components/PaymentScreen.ts: Payment instructions screen that displays a permanent UPI QR code (or a canvas-drawn fallback) along with a copyable UPI ID, order amount, and a confirmation callback for when payment is done.
frontend/src/components/Receipt.tsx: Printable receipt view that fetches an order by ID and renders a formatted receipt card with order details, amount, status progress steps, and attachment links.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCatalog.t: Displays a searchable, categorized list of all available services, allowing users to select a service which triggers the onSelectService callback.
frontend/src/components/ServiceForm.tsx: Renders a service application form with fields for name, mobile, address, and file uploads, submitting the order via a mutation hook and showing a success screen with the order ID on completion.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: Displays an animated splash/loading screen with the app logo, name, and Hindi welcome text, automatically calling onComplete after 2.5 seconds.
frontend/src/components/VijayAIChatbot.t: A floating chatbot widget that handles user messages by matching them against predefined responses via getBotResponse, displaying a bilingual (Hindi/English) chat interface.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides authentication context managing both admin and customer sessions, persisting state to localStorage and exposing login/logout methods for each role.
frontend/src/data/chatbotResponses.ts: Defines a list of keyword-to-response mappings for the chatbot and exports a getBotResponse function that returns a bilingual reply based on matched keywords in the user's message.
frontend/src/data/services.ts: Defines a `Service` interface and exports an array of 32 government/utility services (certificates, ID cards, pensions, etc.) with id, name, category, icon, and description fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, customer auth, orders, QR settings, and admin operations, with polling and admin token injection support.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining a navy-blue/silver/gold design token system with light and dark mode CSS custom properties, plus utility component classes.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: `ExternalBlob` utility class that wraps binary data or a URL, supporting conversion between bytes and object URLs and optional upload progress callbacks.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing), persisting them to `sessionStorage`, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, custom color palettes (navy, silver, gold, oklch-based semantic tokens), fonts (Poppins, Noto Sans Devanagari), border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the 'Vijay Online Centre' project, documenting a known issue where customer form submissions don't appear in the admin dashboard in real-time, along with pending feature requests for auto-invalidation/refetch and backend order-sorting verification.
